rationale: Schema/type and args-contract review passes. The workflow validates all command/path-bearing inputs before constructing commands: slug/spec/bead_id use path-element plus shell-metachar guards, target uses branch-safe grammar plus shell guard, round is a positive integer, and mix is a non-empty enum-checked claude/codex list. sha is advisory-only and never sets panel state. claude_sub_on_quota fail-closes via args.claude_sub_on_quota === true, matching the ms-panel-run runner-dispatch prose that resolves it from panel.substitution.claude_sub_on_quota. Verdict paths are the 110 <slot>-round-<N>.json shape, codex stdout logs go to <slot>-round-<N>.codex.log, and the codex wrapper prompt enforces the one standalone verdict-object rule with zero/multiple/narrative routed to parse_failure, retry once, then MISSING. WorkflowFiles()/installWorkflows signatures are coherent, Claude-only install is wired through RunClaude, and created/skipped counts are updated. Empirical check: go test ./plugins/... ./internal/setup/... passed.
